title: lobelia griffithii
intro: Lobelia griffithii, also known as Griffith's lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of lobelia griffithii include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of lobelia griffithii can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions due to its active compounds, including lobeline and lobelanine.
